summary: Recovered the verify and module-upgrade gates for the next-action rule materialization path. Existing sc.project.next_action.rule rows now carry the approved create-task priority and condition baseline, and a fresh bootstrap-only in-progress project emits 创建任务 first at runtime.

notes: The XML loader and verify gate are both recovered.
The approved rule baseline is now applied to existing runtime rows through the replay path.
Future noupdate-backed rule changes should follow the same explicit materialization pattern.

next_step: Recommendation correctness closure for the previously uncovered branches is complete. Any further work should start as a new, explicitly scoped objective.
